name: oehrpy-validator
description: Validate openEHR FLAT format compositions against Web Templates

commands.title: oehrpy: Select Web Template for This File
oehrpy: Show Valid Paths for Template

oehrpy.platform.description: CDR platform dialect for FLAT path validation.

oehrpy.validateOnSave.description: Validate FLAT compositions automatically on file save.

oehrpy.webTemplatePaths.description: Map of template IDs to web template file paths. Example: { "IDCR - Adverse Reaction List.v1": "./templates/adverse_reaction_wt.json" }

oehrpy.flatCompositionPatterns.description: Glob patterns of files to always treat as FLAT compositions (overrides auto-detection).

oehrpy.webTemplatePatterns.description: Glob patterns of files to always treat as Web Templates.

oehrpy.enableHover.description: Show hover documentation for FLAT paths.

oehrpy.enableQuickFix.description: Show Quick Fix suggestions for invalid FLAT paths.

oehrpy.enableAutocomplete.description: Enable FLAT path autocomplete suggestions from Web Template.

oehrpy.enableTemplateExplorer.description: Show the Web Template structure as a tree view in the Explorer sidebar.

oehrpy.enableOptValidation.description: Validate OPT 1.4 templates (.opt / openEHR <template> XML) via the Python oehrpy CLI. FLAT validation runs in-process and is unaffected by this setting.

oehrpy.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter used for OPT (.opt/.xml) validation. Leave empty to auto-detect via the Python extension or python3 on PATH. Not used for FLAT validation, which runs in-process.

oehrpy.optValidationTimeout.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait for the OPT validation CLI before timing out.

scripts.test: tsc -p ./ && node ./out/test/unit/detector.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/autocomplete.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/templateTree.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/validation.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/opt.test.js
scripts.test:unit: tsc -p ./ && node ./out/test/unit/detector.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/autocomplete.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/templateTree.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/validation.test.js && node ./out/test/unit/opt.test.js
